name: Courtesy Credit
description_short: Houston-based installment lender offering unsecured personal loans up to $1,700 with 12-month repayment terms. Regulated by Consumer Credit Commission with rates significantly lower than payday lenders.
description_long:
Courtesy Credit is a Houston, Texas-based personal loan company located at 7006 Woodridge Dr, Houston, TX 77087. The company claims to be one of the first loan companies in Houston regulated by the Consumer Credit Commission to offer online personal loan programs. They position themselves as an alternative to traditional payday lenders, emphasizing lower rates and installment-based repayment structures.

The company offers unsecured personal loans (also called signature loans or cash loans) up to $1,700 with repayment terms up to 12 months. Their application process is designed for speed: online applications take approximately 5 minutes, with phone approval decisions within 30 minutes, and funds wired within one business day. They explicitly state their rates do not vary based on credit score and claim to accept applicants with both good and poor credit. The company reports loans to credit bureaus to help borrowers establish credit history.

Couresy Credit differentiates itself by explicitly rejecting payday loan company pricing and structures. They state they are "10 times cheaper than Payday Advance Companies" and emphasize that they are "not a payday loan company." All loans are installment-based rather than lump-sum due models. They also offer a referral program providing $25 for each referred friend approved for a loan.

The company operates with limited transparency regarding specific interest rates, fees, or actual APRs on their public website. While they claim lower rates than payday lenders, absolute pricing is not disclosed. Regulatory claims regarding Consumer Credit Commission oversight cannot be independently verified from the website alone. The maximum loan amount of $1,700 may be insufficient for larger personal financing needs.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans. Many of these lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Maximum loan amount of $1,700 with up to 12-month repayment terms — longer repayment period than typical payday loans
Claims rates 10 times lower than payday advance companies with no credit score-based rate variation
Unsecured loans requiring no collateral, unlike title or pawn-based lending
Fast approval process: 5-minute online application with 30-minute phone approval decision
Next-day funding via wire transfer to borrower's bank account
Reports payments to credit bureaus to help establish credit history
$25 referral bonus for approved friend referrals
cons: No specific interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules disclosed on website — applicants cannot compare costs upfront
Maximum loan amount of $1,700 is relatively small for major personal finance needs
Company claims about Consumer Credit Commission regulation cannot be verified independently from website
Limited information about eligibility requirements, income verification, or credit score thresholds
No online payment system or account management portal visible on website — only generic 'Pay Now' option
best_for: Borrowers in Houston, Texas seeking installment loans under $1,700 who want faster approval than traditional banks
Consumers with poor or limited credit seeking an alternative to payday lenders with lower rates and longer repayment terms
Applicants prioritizing credit-building opportunity through credit bureau reporting of loan payments
diagnosis: Courtesy Credit is best for Houston-area borrowers seeking small personal loans ($500–$1,700) with fast approval and longer repayment terms than payday lenders. The primary caveat is that specific pricing information is not published online, making true rate comparison impossible before application — borrowers must call 713-228-0281 to understand actual costs.
services: Cash loans up to $1,700 in Houston, Texas
Personal loans with up to 12-month repayment terms
Next-day funds wiring to borrower bank accounts
Document submission via fax or email
Credit bureau reporting for loan history
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
